headline: Chuckles Snortleberry Laughs So Hard He Snorts, Startles Himself, Laughs Harder
summary: The feedback loop continued for 47 minutes until he passed out from joy.
fullBody: Chuckles Snortleberry entered a laughter feedback loop after snorting while laughing at his own joke. 'The snort was so unexpected that I laughed harder, which caused another snort,' Snortleberry explained between giggles. The cycle continued for 47 minutes until he lost consciousness from 'excessive joy.' Doctors say he's fine, but 'prone to spontaneous giggling.' Snortleberry plans to enter the laughter Olympics next year.
